name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M83225 Pink] The Louis Vuitton classic Monogram pattern appears on soft Monogram Empreinte leather, making the iconic Zippy wallet stand out. Fully zippered with exquisite lining, its compact design is highly functional. Can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (L x H x W) C
